name: VISTY

Name

VISTY (ヴィスティ, Visuti)

Character Designer

Kazari Tayu

Tagline

For Stella's twinkle

Team Colors

Main

#F668B2 (Hot Pink)

Sub

#F4ED57 (Neon Yellow)

While having this catchy and modern atmosphere, breaking down the different elements of their music reveals a range of possibilities. Note the hip-hop potential coming in and out of their songs.”

-Buraikan

Team Profile

An idol group who suffered a great fall from fame due to the sudden withdrawal of their center member at the height of their popularity. While each member excels in their abilities, they are left in the shadow of their loss, treated as leftovers. With everything to lose, these idols are betting it all on this one last chance to prove themselves.

Members

  • Shogo Yamato

  • Toma Hikage

  • Aoi Kureha

  • Kantaro Misuji

Songs

  • For my Stella

  • BE A STAR

  • Endless Dream

  • NEVER END

  • MAGIC CARPET

  • Linger

  • Visty's fanbase is referred to as "Stella".

  • All members of VISTY's Twitter accounts are following the other characters, except for 1Nm8.

“I won’t let you define me by my parents anymore.”

Profile

Serious and honest, the dependable leader of VISTY. He is good at taking care of others and is trusted deeply by his fellow unit-members, but life seems to have dealt him the short straw.
